name: German Chocolate "Pig Out
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cake mix, 1/3 cup of evaporated milk, and melted margarine in a bowl until well mixed.
2. Spread half of the mixture evenly in the bottom of a 9 x 13-inch cake pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 5 minutes.
4. In another saucepan, heat the caramels and 1/3 cup of evaporated milk over medium heat until melted.
5. Remove from heat and stir in the chopped pecans and chocolate chips.
6. Spread this mixture on top of the baked layer.
7. Add the remaining half of the cake batter to the pan.
8. Bake at 350°F for an additional 20 minutes, or until set.
